narrative:
Precinct Liverpool Twp West (precinct in Columbiana County) has 1,304 registered voters, with 61.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.7 percentage points.
